body_preview:
Would you like paper copies of these documents?

On Wed, Apr 1, 2026 at 10:09 AM benjamin barber <starworks5@gmail.com>
wrote:

>
>
> On Wed, Apr 1, 2026 at 10:09 AM benjamin barber <starworks5@gmail.com>
> wrote:
>
>>
>>
>> On Wed, Apr 1, 2026 at 10:07 AM Ashley Glass <
>> Ashley.Glass@homeforward.org> wrote:
>>
>>> Hello,
>>>
>>>
>>>
>>> This has been received.
>>>
>>>
>>>
>>> *Ashley Glass *
>>>
>>> Rent Assistance Services Coordinator
>>>
>>> 503-802-8315
>>>
>>> [image: Logo Description automatically generated]
>>>
>>>
>>>
>>> If you need to report any household or income changes, you can download
>>> documents from the participant portal at
>>>
>>> https://portal.homeforward.org/Forms/Participant
>>>
>>>
>>>
>>> You can pick up forms or drop off packets at our customer service
>>> window.
>>>
>>> The customer service window is open Tuesday – Thursday from 9:00AM –
>>> noon and 1:00PM - 3:00PM at 135 SW Ash Street
>>>
>>>
>>>
>>> *From:* benjamin barber <starworks5@gmail.com>
>>> *Sent:* Wednesday, April 1, 2026 9:51 AM
>>> *To:* Ashley Glass <Ashley.Glass@homeforward.org>
>>> *Subject:* Re: Request for additional information: Cortez - DUE
>>> 04/15/2026
>>>
>>>
>>>
>>> 🛑  CAUTION: This email is NOT from a Home Forward email address. Do
>>> NOT click links or open attachments unless you recognize the sender and
>>> know the content is safe. *Home Forward does NOT have a "Safe Sender"
>>> list.* :CAUTION  🛑
>>>
>>>
>>>
>>>
>>>
>>> On Tue, Mar 31, 2026 at 1:51 PM Ashley Glass <
>>> Ashley.Glass@homeforward.org> wrote:
>>>
>>> Hello,
>>>
>>>
>>>
>>> I am processing your intake with Home Forward and there are a couple
>>> things I need in order to issue your voucher:
>>>
>>>    1. Social Security award letter for Jane
>>>    2. The statement of eligibility states Benjamin receives $937.00 a
>>>    month from Hallucinate LLC, but the 1040 received lists a negative income.
>>>    Can you confirm if you are receiving regular income from the business or if
>>>    it is negative?
>>>    3. The statement of eligibility states Benjamin works full-time,
>>>    part-time, seasonally, and also owns or operates a business. Can you
>>>    confirm if Benjamin is working for an employer full-time/part-time and owns
>>>    a separate business he also works at?
>>>    4. HUD Debts Owed Form signed by Benjamin
>>>
>>>
>>>
>>> Thank you,
>>>
>>>
>>>
>>> *Ashley Glass*
>>>
>>> Rent Assistance Services Coordinator
>>>
>>> [image: Logo Description automatically generated]
>>>
>>>
>>>
>>> 135 SW Ash Street
>>>
>>> Portland, Oregon 97204
>>>
>>>
>>>
>>> *tel:* 503.802.8315
>>>
>>> *fax:* 503.802.8330
>>>
>>> *tty*: 503.802.8554
>>>
>>> *web:* www.homeforward.org
>>>
>>>
>>>
>>> Extensions must be submitted in writing before the voucher expires.
>>>
>>>
>>>
>>> Reporting household changes must be in writing. Forms are available on
>>> Home Forward’s website. On the homepage, enter keywords: Housing
>>> program>housing choice voucher>participant>household changes. You can
>>> also request to have the forms mailed to you.
>>>
>>>
>>>
>>> You can pick up forms or drop off packets at our customer service
>>> window.
>>>
>>> The customer service window is open Tuesday – Thursday from 9:00AM –
>>> noon and 1:00PM - 3:00PM at 135 SW Ash Street
>>>
>>>
>>>
>>>
>>>
>>>
>>>
>>> Confidentiality Notice: This communication may contain privileged or
>>> other confidential information exempt from disclosure. If you are not the
>>> intended recipient, you may not use, copy, disseminate or retain this
>>> message. Please delete the copy you received and alert the sender to the
>>> transmission error. Thank you.
>>>
>>>
>>>
>>>
subject: Re: Request for additional information: Cortez - DUE 04/15/2026
